channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car has been abandoned in car park for at least 2 years., 6th May
item.description:
Car has been abandoned in our car park for over two years, is taking up two residents parking spaces.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterside Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip by bin, 6th May
item.description:
Pavement obstruction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip by lampost, 6th May
item.description:
Obstruction of pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Royal Mail truck locked to lampost., 6th May
item.description:
The attached photograph shows an abandoned Royal Mail cart locked to a lampost. It has been in this position for several months and is now being used as a litter bin, which is not being empties by the council (or Royal Mail)). Causing an OBSTRUCTION.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bag, 6th May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bag that was previously reported on top of the electrical exchange box. The issue has not been cleared / resolved and now the rubbish bag has been tipped onto the floor scattering litter over the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Mary's Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White Goods, 6th May
item.description:
Abandoned not collected. Been here for at least a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-34, Amblecote Road, Chinbrook, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 6th May
item.description:
Beside the cycle hanger, could it be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monnow Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household fly tilling, 6th May
item.description:
Outside the road by the estate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Talfourd Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish being dumped on Maberley Crescent, 6th May
item.description:
More and more is being added each day, sometimes multiple times a day!! Mattresses, table, part of a crusty sofa and more

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maberley Crescent, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on back of sign, 6th May
item.description:
Graffiti on back of sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, front of McDonald. Mom-offensive tag on cabinet., 6th May
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants keep flytipping their rubbish, 6th May
item.description:
The tenants of 17 Willenhall road keep dumping their rubbish/ old furniture on the pavement outside their address. As quickly as it’s reported and cleared by the council- they just dump more. Please can enforcement action be taken to stop this repeat offending.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willenhall Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Tesco, 6th May
item.description:
Usual black bags dumped, could they be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 179, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th May
item.description:
Blocking pavement and street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fordyce Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky furniture, 6th May
item.description:
Near recycle bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Clothing, 6th May
item.description:
Once again a pile of unwanted clothing has been dumped on the pavement instead of actually being put inside the clothing donation bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovel Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 39 Victoria Road, 6th May
item.description:
Parking restriction notices to address the overgrown tree has been put on the wrong side of the road. The notices have been put on the opposite side of the road near the pay and display meter. This needs to be addressed before 13 May 2026.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big black rubbish bag left on the street., 6th May
item.description:
Someone flytip a black bag next to my weekly collection bins thinking the refuse truck was going to collect it. if its yours please dispose of it properly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Hill, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpets rolls dumped in street, 6th May
item.description:
There are large rolls of carpet which have been dumped. This is a constant area of fly tipping. Put a camera there and makes some money.. and stop people from doing this!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole in the middle of the road., 6th May
item.description:
Heavy traffic hitting a huge pothole outside number 96 Petts Wood Road making loud thuds and this is disturbing my sleep. I wake several times in the night as a result of this problem.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
